message.en:
"dc3d720 Add step to accept Android SDK licenses
c6aba91 chore: update dependencies and refactor changelog screen styling
fadcc6f build: bump version to 0.6.1+17
fe27266 feat(ui): extract site selector to standalone widget and move to home screen
c6dbd43 refactor(ui): refine navigation and history component styles
774b4b7 style(ui): update change password layout and default footer padding
ded7a07 feat(ui): format and clean changelog text display
a874d2a feat(error): add log export and github reporting to error screen
d1c9166 feat(settings): replace changelog dialog with a dedicated screen
bc407b7 feat(ui): add global error boundary and app error screen
d677df6 refactor(ui): update icons to rounded variants and consolidate settings layout
db50d55 refactor(ui): migrate icons to material symbols and optimize widgets
ff0385c chore: update versionarte.json and changelog to v0.6.0
"
message.vi: Chúng tôi đang bảo trì hệ thống. Vui lòng quay lại sau!
